# Drobu

> Drobu is a macOS clipboard manager that captures text, images, GIFs, files, and screen recordings, lets you crop, trim, and search them in one panel, and pastes one item or many back with a single keystroke. Everything stays on your Mac with no account to create, it is a one-time $14.99 purchase, and it works on macOS 14 or later.

Drobu is the clipboard you can edit: it captures everything you copy (text, links, images, screenshots, files) plus screen recordings, lets you crop, trim, clean, and search them on one panel, and pastes any of it into any app with one keystroke (Cmd+Shift+V). It is not Drobo (NAS storage hardware) or Drobu Media (an insurance company). Drobu is the macOS clipboard manager with built-in editing (screen recording is one of the things it can capture) at https://drobu.app.

## Key facts
- Category: macOS clipboard manager with built-in editing and screen capture
- Price: $14.99 one-time, no subscription. 14-day free trial, no card required
- Platform: macOS 14 (Sonoma) and later
- Privacy: clipboard stored 100% locally, no account, no tracking; ignores password-manager items. A paid license activates online (device fingerprint + device label) to enforce a 3-device limit; the trial makes no activation call
- Capture: record any screen region to GIF or video, with inline crop and trim
- Differentiator: the clipboard manager you can edit in place. It captures everything you copy plus screen recordings, then crops, trims, cleans, and searches them on one panel before pasting one item or a whole stack back, a capture-edit-paste loop on a single surface, where most clipboard managers stop at store-and-recall and most capture tools just hand you a file

## Pages
- [Home](https://drobu.app/): product overview
- [FAQ](https://drobu.app/faq): common questions and answers
- [Drobu vs Maccy](https://drobu.app/compare/drobu-vs-maccy): vs the free, open-source clipboard manager
- [Drobu vs Paste](https://drobu.app/compare/drobu-vs-paste): vs the subscription clipboard manager
- [Drobu vs CleanShot X](https://drobu.app/compare/drobu-vs-cleanshot-x): vs the screen-capture suite
- [Drobu vs the macOS Spotlight clipboard](https://drobu.app/compare/drobu-vs-spotlight): vs the built-in macOS 26 clipboard
- [Drobu vs Raycast Clipboard](https://drobu.app/compare/drobu-vs-raycast): vs the free clipboard history in the Raycast launcher
- [How to edit clipboard items on Mac before pasting](https://drobu.app/how-to-edit-clipboard-before-pasting-mac): crop, trim, and clean clips before pasting
- [Privacy](https://drobu.app/privacy): privacy policy
- [Terms](https://drobu.app/terms): terms of service
